rationale.R1.6: The output is well-edited with no cosmetic issues and maintains consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty about the effect of operator strategy drift on training distribution was acknowledged but not quantified.
rationale.RX.3: Output precisely covers the requested evaluation details without deviation.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced, and potential failure modes are identified.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced to their sources; however, minor edits lack explicit source attribution.
